news_catalyst.headline: Jim Cramer on Wendy's: 'I'm Going to Say No to Owning That Stock'
news_catalyst.summary: Jim Cramer explicitly passed on Wendy's. QSR sector facing consumer spending headwinds. WEN carries significant debt from its franchise model. Earnings August 7.

technical.summary: Wyckoff Phase B bullish but the 0.31x volume ratio is extremely thin — almost no participation. RSI neutral at 52.9. DCF not computed. Avoid.

key_strengths: Franchise model provides recurring royalty income
key_concerns: High leverage from franchise model refranchising
fundamentals.summary: C grade. High debt, consumer headwinds, and Jim Cramer's pass — avoid.
